HGSS.605.0000:
Morty: It’s good of you to have come.\f
Here in Ecruteak, Pokémon have long
been revered.\f
It’s said that a rainbow-hued
Pokémon will come down to appear\r
before a truly powerful Trainer.\f
I believed that tale, so I have
secretly trained here all my life.\f
As a result, I can now see what
others cannot.\f
I see a shadow of the person who
will make the Pokémon appear.\f
I believe that person is me!\f
You’re going to help me reach
that level!\f
HGSS.605.0001:
Morty: I don’t think our potentials are
so different. But you seem to have\r
something more than that...\f
So be it. This Badge is yours.\f
HGSS.605.0002:
[0103,0000,0000] received
the Fog Badge from Morty!
HGSS.605.0003:
Morty: By having the Fog Badge,
Pokémon up to Lv. 50, including traded\r
Pokémon, will obey you.\f
Also, Pokémon will be able to use Surf.\f
Here is another thing...
I want you to have this, too.\f
HGSS.605.0005:
Morty: It’s Shadow Ball. It causes
damage and may reduce Special Defense.\r
Use it if it appeals to you.
HGSS.605.0006:
Morty: I get it...\f
The person the Kimono Girls were
talking about must be you...\f
Never mind.\f
You should be strong enough to go
across the sea.\f
When you go west and then south,
you’ll reach Olivine City.\r
Why don’t you head for it?
HGSS.605.0007:
Yo! Champ in the making!
The Trainers here use Ghost-type\r
Pokémon at will.\f
A ghost is like a shade or a phantom...
It won’t do any good to use physical\r
strength alone.
HGSS.605.0008:
Whew, [0103,0000,0000].
You did great!\f
I was cowering in the corner out of
pure terror!
HGSS.605.0009:
You have business with the Gym Leader?\f
Morty, the Gym Leader, has gone to
the Burned Tower.\f
Sorry, but you’ll have to leave.
Ho ho ho.\f
HGSS.605.0011:
Ecruteak City Pokémon Gym\f
Leader: Morty
Certified Trainer!\r
[0103,0000,0000]
